title: Spermatogenic Cells Isolation
author: Layla Simón
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rwid7ce

steps.title: Rabbits were sacrificed applying a lethal...
steps.instruction: Rabbits were sacrificed applying a lethal dose of pentobarbital via pinna marginal veins undetermined, Euthanyle

steps.title: Testicles were surgically obtained and placed...
steps.instruction: Testicles were surgically obtained and placed on Petri dishes with PBS. Tunica albuginea was removed with sterile forceps and seminiferous tubules were treated with collagenase. 5 , 5 mg/mL collagenase in PBS 00:10:00, at 37 °C

steps.title: Seminiferous tubules were selected according to the spermatogenic cycle
steps.instruction: Seminiferous tubules were selected according to the spermatogenic cycle. Specifically, tubules with cells under acrosome development were isolated (stages VI to VIII). Seminiferous tubules in these stages were detected by trans-illumination method. Tubules with dark lumen (full of spermatids and sperm cells) were selected. doi: 10.1530/jrf.0.0050309 doi: 10.1002/jemt.1070320504

steps.title: Selected seminiferous tubules were placed on slides with PBS
steps.instruction: Selected seminiferous tubules were placed on slides with PBS. Tubules were extruded with a cover-slip in order to obtain spermatogenic cells. Spermatogenic cells were fixed with paraformaldehyde in PBS. Cells were smeared on slides or transferred to microtubes. 4 , paraformaldehyde
